features: Who is it for: Aquafresh extra fresh daily mouthwash is suitable for the family from 6 years to adults
Health Benefits: Aquafresh extra fresh Daily Mouthwash provides sugar acid protection*, creating a shield that protects the tooth surface and strengthens enamel
Why choose: It works as a mouthwash for bad breath, provides cavity prevention, helps keep gums healthy**, strengthens enamel, has an anti-bacterial action and ideal taste
Usage: Use this mouthwash for fresh breath twice daily for one minute and combine with Aquafresh complete care toothpaste for even stronger protection*
*Follow a healthy diet and brush twice-daily with a fluoride toothpaste as protection may decrease between brushing **reduces plaque to maintain healthy gums
description: Product Description Who is it for: Aquafresh extra fresh daily mouthwash is a mouthwash suitable for the family from 6 years to adults and provides six key benefits to help keep your mouth clean, healthy and fresh. Health benefits: Aquafresh extra fresh daily mouthwash provides long-lasting sugar acid protection*, creating a shield that protects the tooth surface. It draws minerals into the tooth structure leaving harder, strengthened tooth enamel. Why choose: Aquafresh extra fresh daily mouthwash provides your family with whole mouth protection by getting where your toothbrush misses. It is a mouthwash for fresh breath that strengthens enamel and helps keep gums Healthy**. It is an anti-cavity mouthwash that has an anti-bacterial action and is alcohol-free. Usage: To enjoy all the benefits, use Aquafresh extra fresh daily mouthwash for fresh breath twice daily for one minute and combine with Aquafresh complete care toothpaste for even stronger protection*. *Follow a healthy diet and brush twice-daily with a fluoride toothpaste as protection may decrease between brushing **Reduces plaque to maintain healthy gums Directions Use the mouthwash for one minute, twice a day Safety Warning Do not swallow See more
